source_declaration.declaration_line: theorem det_of_lowerTriangular [LinearOrder m] (M : Matrix m m R) (h : M.BlockTriangular toDual) :
source_declaration.name: Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular
source_declaration.source_snippet:
theorem det_of_lowerTriangular [LinearOrder m] (M : Matrix m m R) (h : M.BlockTriangular toDual) :
    M.det = ∏ i : m, M i i := by
  rw [← det_transpose]
  exact det_of_upperTriangular h.transpose

source_declaration.name: Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular
source_declaration.source_snippet:
theorem det_of_upperTriangular [LinearOrder m] (h : M.BlockTriangular id) :
    M.det = ∏ i : m, M i i := by
  haveI : DecidableEq R := Classical.decEq _
  simp_rw [h.det, image_id, det_toSquareBlock_id]
